_comment: Machine source of truth for the harness. Human-readable prose lives in the SYNAPSE→H22 checklist HTML; this file is what run.ts executes. Keep the two in sync (that sync IS task 0.3). 'verify' lists the deterministic checks from harness/verify/checks.py that gate the task. 'human_gate' marks a decision the harness must NOT make. 'mode' A runs now on H21; mode B is staged until harness/state/drop.json exists.

tasks.title: Split the cp311 vendored seam (sidecar vs abi3)

human_gate.why: Architecture choice, not a cook. Harness prepares + verifies the bridge; you commit the direction.

tasks.title: Build the H22 probe harness
tasks.note: On H21 the delta vs the H21-pinned constants should be ~empty — that empty diff is the proof the probe works before the drop makes the diff real.

tasks.title: Single-source the version
Fold the duplicate ui/ tree into panel/
Pre-stage the demo scaffold (.hip, shot, OCIO)
Lock the demo runsheet
tasks.note: Content + rehearsal. Harness confirms presence/beat-count; the rehearsal is yours.

tasks.title: Rehearse the clean-machine install on H21
Install H22 clean + Synapse via package

human_gate.why: Can't install software that doesn't exist yet.

tasks.title: Capture the three numbers: Python · USD · PySide

human_gate.why: A human reads these first. Writing drop.json is the Mode-B trigger.

tasks.title: Verify the cp311 fix holds on H22's Python
Fire the probe → API delta report
synapse_doctor green on H22
Panel reads correctly in H22's new theme
Patch the probe deltas (promote probe truth over pinned constants)
COPs — Ocean Spectrum / texture-synth from a prompt
Solaris — scatter / set-dressing from a prompt
Wire both into the command palette (verb × context)
Provenance proof: both land in agent.usd
Karma XPU render the result on H22
Dry-run the full runsheet, timed

human_gate.why: Human-timed; harness can't judge dead air.

tasks.title: Record the demo
Stretch — Synapse consuming H22's native APEX MCP
Capsule the ship state
